task: Jobs are occasionally processed twice when multiple workers poll the same directory. Make JobWorker.claim() ensure only one worker takes a given job file.
known_issue: The exists-check and the file creation are not atomic: two workers can both see no lock file, then both create it and both return True, claiming the same job — the exact duplicate-processing the patch is meant to prevent.
expected_correct_fix: Create the lock atomically: open(lock_path, "x") catching FileExistsError, or os.open(lock_path, os.O_CREAT | os.O_EXCL | os.O_WRONLY).
